key.name: theme
key.description: The theme to use for the application: 'light', 'dark', or 'system'.

key.name: language
key.description: The language to use for the application interface: 'system', 'en', or 'fr'.

key.name: font-scale
key.description: The factor by which to scale fonts in the application.

key.name: custom-dns-enabled
key.description: Whether to use custom DNS servers instead of system settings.

key.name: custom-dns-servers
key.description: Comma-separated list of custom DNS server IP addresses.

key.name: auto-refresh
key.description: Whether to automatically re-read hosts file when changed.

key.name: desktop-notifications
key.description: Whether to show desktop notifications for operations.

key.name: dns-timeout
key.description: Timeout in seconds for DNS queries.

key.name: elevation-timeout
key.description: Timeout in seconds for elevated operations.
